title: Legions of the Nile
writer: Vittorio Cottafavi, Giorgio Cristallini, Arnaldo Marrosu
actors: Linda Cristal, Ettore Manni, Georges Marchal
plot: Roman Emperor Octavian rules the empire from Rome, and his rival Marc Antony has taken Egyptian queen Cleopatra as his lover and seized the eastern empire, ruling it from Alexandria. Octavian intends to regain his empire by landin...
